A restrained, textural Japandi‑inspired interior that balances deep, matte dark surfaces with warm natural wood and minimal, sculptural accents. The mood is calm and intimate: low ambient illumination, focused warm accent lights, and deliberately curated negative space. Materials read tactile and honest — smoked oak, matte black stone, warm brass — with a limited warm‑neutral palette to keep visual cohesion across connected spaces. Use the south/east window for balanced daylight on the desk area. Add a small recessed reading light for the bed area (warm 2700K).
